author: iamgodot
description: Integrate Claude AI for chatting in notes.

manifest.author: Godot
manifest.description: Integrate Claude AI for chatting in notes.
manifest.name: CAO

name: CAO

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Update models to add newest Opus 4.5 model and remove Sonnet 3.7 model. From now on only active models listed [here](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/about-claude/model-deprecations#model-status) will be available in the settings, for deprecated ones you can set specifically in the front matter.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Now you can use **Callouts** for chat formatting. It's turned off by default as an experimental feature, and you can't use callouts in existing chats which have already used headers. Here's a screenshot for example: There're also fixes for streaming response and token usage. Now with no additional intervals, streaming response should be much faster and non-streaming response would show up once fully generated. For token usage, OpenAI-compatible APIs should also display accurate results now.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Now you can rename chat notes as you like and `Open last chat` will work correctly using modified timestamps, there's also a new `Select chat` command for choosing any chat from the history.

**Custom prompts** now is supported, simply add one in the settings and insert from the command palette with its name. You can also use it as a slash command after enabling the [slash commands](https://help.obsidian.md/plugins/slash-commands) core plugin.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Update the Claude model list in the settings, from now on only the active models will be kept in the list, for deprecated models users can set them in the front matter. For latest model status on Claude check [here](https://docs.claude.com/en/docs/about-claude/model-deprecations#model-status).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Now custom API providers are supported, so 3rd-party providers such as OpenRouter and non-Claude models can be used. Please know this is still experimental and may not be stable, check out README for more details.

The original official Anthropic API support stays unchanged.

releases.author: iamgodot
releases.description: Update available models based on Claude's official [model status](https://docs.claude.com/en/docs/about-claude/model-deprecations#model-status), now we have latest Sonnet 4.5, Haiku 3.5 and Opus 4.1. Thanks to @SarahTrees for the contribution!

releases.author: iamgodot
releases.description:
Now CAO calls Claude's **streaming API** for responses by default, which should provide the **fastest generation**. Users can turn it off in the settings for the old behavior, where CAO uses sync API and simulate streaming response by adding time intervals.

Token count will be shown at the end of every response, but can also be toggled off in the settings.

releases.author: iamgodot
releases.description:
Now wikilinks in prompts are supported as additional context:

- You can use it for full notes, headings or blocks with display text
- For full notes, front matters are included as well
- Wikilinks from linked notes **won't be parsed**

New Claude models are updated in the settings, including Sonnet 3.7

releases.author: iamgodot
releases.description: Minor fixes according to Obsidian plugin guidelines.

releases.author: iamgodot
releases.description: Fixed it when cursor is not set to the end properly.

releases.author: iamgodot
releases.description: Now you can chat with Claude in a note.
